name.zh: 实时 TTS GPU 推理流水线

description.en: Built a real-time GPU inference pipeline for ChatTTSPlus using structural pruning, quantization, and knowledge distillation to reduce end-to-end latency and support interactive speech synthesis. In this work, I was also responsible for the interaction path between backend services and the LLM, where LLM-generated text was passed into the TTS system and converted into natural-sounding speech for users.
description.zh: 基于结构化剪枝、量化和知识蒸馏为 ChatTTSPlus 构建了实时 GPU 推理流水线，以降低端到端延迟并支持交互式语音合成。在这个项目中，我还负责后端服务与 LLM 之间的交互链路：由 LLM 生成文本，再送入 TTS 系统，最终转换为面向用户的自然语音。

name.en: GPU Runtime Optimization for Deep Learning Inference
name.zh: 面向深度学习推理的 GPU 运行时优化

description.en: This research effort included a series of sub-projects. I actively worked on two major directions. First, I built a fine-grained software-defined GPU scheduler and a CUDA kernel code-generation pipeline with TVM and PyTorch, enabling multiple DNN models and heterogeneous GPU kernels to execute concurrently on a single GPU with lower kernel-launch overhead, up to 50% lower global memory usage, and 5%–30% lower inference latency. This line of work also aimed to avoid the padding-heavy kernel merging strategies commonly used in machine learning compilers, reducing memory waste and improving GPU utilization, with potential extension to future LLM applications. Second, I designed a fine-grained GPU resource-scaling framework to control GPU utilization, temperature, and power behavior during inference, reducing latency by 13% through less overheating and finer-grained thermal control. I am also exploring more sophisticated controller policies and the long-term integration of these directions into an industrial-level toolkit.
description.zh: 这项研究实际上包含一系列子项目，我主要深度参与了其中两个方向。第一，我构建了细粒度的软件定义 GPU 调度器，以及基于 TVM 和 PyTorch 的 CUDA Kernel 代码生成流水线，使多个 DNN 模型和异构 GPU Kernel 能够在单块 GPU 上以更低的 Kernel 启动开销并发执行，最多降低 50% 的全局显存占用，并将推理延迟降低 5%–30%。这一方向还试图避免传统机器学习编译器中依赖大量 padding 的 Kernel 合并方式，从而减少内存浪费、提高 GPU 利用率，并为未来在 LLM 场景中的应用打基础。第二，我设计了细粒度的 GPU 资源伸缩框架，用于在推理过程中控制 GPU 利用率、温度与功耗行为，通过减少过热并进行更细粒度的温控，将推理延迟进一步降低了 13%。我也在继续探索更复杂的控制器策略，以及将这两个方向整合成工业级工具链的可能性。

name.en: Reliable AI: Model Compression with Uncertainty Calibration
name.zh: 可信 AI：带不确定性校准的模型压缩

description.en: Built a structural pruning framework for DNNs with calibrated uncertainty estimation during fine-tuning, covering models such as ResNet-50, DeepSense, A3C, and Transformer. By reforming the training process with a novel regularization strategy, this work improved the reliability (AUROC) of compressed models by 5%–10% when detecting incorrect predictions on OOD inputs and adversarial examples. The core motivation was to reduce overconfident mistakes in AI systems that interact with the physical world and help compressed models better recognize when they are likely to be wrong.
description.zh: 构建了面向 DNN 的结构化剪枝框架，并在微调阶段引入不确定性校准，覆盖 ResNet-50、DeepSense、A3C 和 Transformer 等模型。通过以一种新的正则化思路重构训练过程，这项工作将压缩模型在检测 OOD 输入和对抗样本上的错误预测时的可靠性指标（AUROC）提升了 5%–10%。其核心目标是减少会与真实环境交互的 AI 系统中“过度自信但出错”的情况，让压缩模型更好地意识到自己何时可能是错的。

name.zh: 免费内容网站测量研究

description.en: Designed and implemented automated measurement pipelines using Python, Selenium, Shodan, IPInfo, and SecurityTrails, and analyzed security risks in free-content websites worldwide through large-scale data cleaning and curation.
description.zh: 使用 Python、Selenium、Shodan、IPInfo 和 SecurityTrails 设计并实现自动化测量流水线，并通过大规模数据清洗与整理分析全球免费内容网站的安全风险。

name.zh: BizMerlin 后端 API 工程

description.en: Implemented REST APIs with Spring Boot and Maven in Java to interact with MongoDB, validated interfaces with Postman, and coordinated development progress through Jira.
description.zh: 使用 Java、Spring Boot 和 Maven 实现与 MongoDB 交互的 REST API，使用 Postman 验证接口，并通过 Jira 协同推进开发进度。
